how_to_apply: Bihar Public Service Commission BPSC Are Issued Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. Recruitment Notification 2026 and Invited Online Application Form for the BPSC Bihar Prosecution Officer Jobs 2026 Candidate Can Apply Online for 27/02/2026 to 20/03/2026

Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the BPSC Latest Prosecution Officer under Home Department (Prosecution Directorate), Govt. of Bihar. Application Form in Sarkari Result Recruitment Latest Job Section.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Hand Writing, Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - ID, DOB Proof, Etc.
Live Photo and Hindi / English Signature Required in BPSC APO Form 2025.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
